user.title: Weather4Agents
user.description: Configure the connection to your Weather4Agents API.

data_description.base_url: Full URL of the Weather4Agents API, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8080
data_description.location: City name as recognised by the API, e.g. bergamo
data_description.scan_interval: How often (in minutes) to refresh weather data. Min 5, max 1440.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Weather4Agents API. Check the URL and make sure the service is running.
error.invalid_location: The specified location was not found. Verify the city name matches a location configured in the API.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Weather4Agents location is already configured.
